articles.title: Africa top health body confirms new Ebola outbreak in remote Congo province - AP News
articles.description: Africa's top public health body has confirmed a new Ebola outbreak in Congo’s remote Ituri province. The Africa CDC reported 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths so far. Most cases and deaths are in the Mongwalu and Rwampara health zones. The agency said that fo…
articles.content: KINSHASA, Congo (AP) Africa CDC, the continents top public health body, on Friday confirmed a new Ebola outbreak in Congos remote Ituri province, with 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths recorded so fa… [+2738 chars]
